font_family.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

usage.labels: Inter, font-medium, text-xs, uppercase, tracking-wider, text-slate-500

layout.card_style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-transparent rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

sidebar.container: h-full w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-50
sidebar.link: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: CLEANUP (CRITICAL)
1. Remove all references to 'ranks', 'XP', 'levels', 'badges', 'confetti', 'gaming', 'CS:GO' styles.
2. Delete `src/lib/ranks.js` if it exists and remove imports.
3. Remove `.game-grid` class and its styles from `App.css`.
4. Remove custom fonts `Barlow Condensed` and use `Inter` for everything.
5. Change the root theme in `index.css` and `tailwind.config.js` to LIGHT MODE by default (use the provided tailwind_config values).
6. Remove any 'neon' or 'glow' effects in CSS.
PHASE 2: LAYOUT & NAVIGATION
1. Implement a clean, vertical Sidebar layout (white bg, border-right).
2. Main content area should have a soft gray background (#f8fafc) to make white cards pop.
3. Ensure the dashboard is responsive (sidebar collapses to hamburger menu on mobile).
PHASE 3: COMPONENT STYLING
1. Style all Cards with `bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm`.
2. Update Buttons to be 'pill' or 'rounded-lg' with professional colors (Slate-900 for primary).
3. Use Shadcn/UI components but override the default dark theme variables to match the new light theme.
PHASE 4: FUNCTIONALITY RETENTION
1. Ensure ALL original pages (Dashboard, Wyniki, Zamówienia, Zadania, Pomysły, Kalendarz, Sklepy, Ustawienia) exist and work.
2. Keep the Login PIN pad but style it professionally (clean round buttons, no gaming glow).
3. Keep the functionality of 'Shopify Store Selection'.
4. Replace 'Rank' widget with a 'Monthly Goal' progress bar or 'Business Health' metric.
GENERAL RULES
1. Use Lucide-React icons (already installed).
2. Charts should use professional colors (Blue, Teal, Indigo) instead of neon/gaming colors.
3. maintain 'Polish' language throughout the app.
universal_guidelines: Do not use centered text for main content, use left-aligned.
